zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert III de Crésecques於1165年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯馬莫次時，他的父親Anselme I Anseau de Crésecques25歲，母親Edwige Marie de Thiennes21歲。他和Mahaut or Mathilde d'Aires至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1217年11月20日在他的家鄉享年52歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert III de Crésecques was born in 1165, in Mametz, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Anselme I Anseau de Crésecques, was 25 and his mother, Edwige Marie de Thiennes, was 21. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Mahaut or Mathilde d'Aires. He died on 20 November 1217, in his hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert III de Crésecques est né en 1165, à Mametz, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Anselme I Anseau de Crésecques, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Edwige Marie de Thiennes, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Mahaut or Mathilde d'Aires. Il est décédé le 20 novembre 1217, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert III de Crésecques 1165 in Mametz, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Anselme I Anseau de Crésecques 25 und seine Mutter Edwige Marie de Thiennes 21. Er hatte mit Mahaut or Mathilde d'Aires mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. November 1217 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert III de Crésecques è nato il nel 1165 nel Mametz, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Anselme I Anseau de Crésecques, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Edwige Marie de Thiennes, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Mahaut or Mathilde d'Aires. Morì il 20 novembre 1217, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert III de Crésecquesが1165年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスマムッツで生まれた時，父Anselme I Anseau de Crésecquesは25歳，母Edwige Marie de Thiennesは21歳であった。彼はMahaut or Mathilde d'Airesとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1217年11月20日に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert III de Crésecques(이)가 1165년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 맘츠에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anselme I Anseau de Crésecques(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Edwige Marie de Thiennes(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Mahaut or Mathilde d'Aires(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1217년 11월 20일 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert III de Crésecques nasceu em 1165, em Mametz, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Anselme I Anseau de Crésecques, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Edwige Marie de Thiennes, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Mahaut or Mathilde d'Aires. Ele faleceu em 20 de novembro de 1217, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert III de Crésecques родился в 1165 г. в местности мамец, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Anselme I Anseau de Crésecques было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Edwige Marie de Thiennes, 21. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Mahaut or Mathilde d'Aires. Он умер 20 ноября 1217 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert III de Crésecques nació en 1165, en Mametz, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Anselme I Anseau de Crésecques, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Edwige Marie de Thiennes, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Mahaut or Mathilde d'Aires. Murió el 20 de noviembre de 1217, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
